name: Ace Pickleball Club - Fort Wayne
description: Ace Pickleball Club - Fort Wayne is a place to play pickleball in Fort Wayne, IN. There are 10 indoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Reservations are available. Amenities include food, locker rooms, restrooms, water, lights, a pro shop or equipment store, and trainers or lessons. A membership is required to play.
